title: Next.js Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert — web, JavaScript, TypeScript and React foundations, getting started, routing, rendering strategies, data fetching, caching and mutations, styling, built-in components and SEO, state and forms, backend APIs, auth and databases, performance, testing, deployment and DevOps, and advanced and expert ecosystem topics.

stages.title: Prerequisites & Foundations
stages.summary: Web, JavaScript, TypeScript, React and tooling basics Next.js builds on.

nodes.description: HTML, CSS, HTTP and how the browser works.

nodes.description: Modern JavaScript for React and Next.js.

nodes.description: TypeScript fundamentals for typed apps.

nodes.description: The React knowledge Next.js is built on.
